economic_notes: First Nation operates VLT gaming, confectionery and fuel sales, contract revenue, Wood Bison Ranch, and a Development Corporation. Economic Development segment shows significant growth in contract revenue from $836,777 to $2,058,395.
notes: Audit is a Disclaimer of Opinion due to inability to obtain adequate audit evidence on expenditures and short-term liability accounts, and no budget was prepared or approved by Council. Financial statements are marked Unaudited on the statement of operations. The consolidated entity includes 6 subsidiaries: Skownan CMHC Housing, Skownan Employment Training and Daycare, Skownan Health Authority, Skownan VLT Operation, Skownan Development Corporation, and Skownan Wood Bison Ranch Ltd. Long-term investments of $10,000,000 are held but not described in detail. Net debt position of ($3,201,968). No schedule of remuneration provided. Chief and Council honoraria of $201,200 noted in Governance segment. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC ($13,021,150), FNIHB ($2,184,924), CMHC ($561,652), Government of Canada ($10,500), Solicitor General ($92,702), First Peoples Development Inc. ($311,621) = $2,130,497 but deferred revenue adjustments make precise OSR calculation complex; reported osr is an approximation based on non-government revenue lines.
